what_it_does: An empty placeholder file that causes Git to track the otherwise empty company/docs/ directory.
conventions: Follows the .gitkeep convention for preserving empty directories in version control
Located in a docs/ folder, implying a documentation area
notes: An empty .gitkeep placeholder that ensures the docs directory is tracked by Git.
purpose_vs_actual: Purpose and actual content align: it exists solely to keep the docs/ directory under version control.
intention_signals: Signals that the docs/ directory is intentionally part of the repository even though it currently holds no documentation files.
contribution: Retains the docs/ directory in the repository index so the project structure remains intact and future documentation has a predefined location.
summary_for_embedding: An empty .gitkeep file in company/docs/ that causes Git to track the otherwise empty docs directory.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to preserve the docs/ directory in version control until documentation is added.
